hero.title: Chorale de Bons Chœurs
hero.subtitle: A passionate choir from Saint-Barthélemy bringing harmony and joy through music

about.title: About Our Choir
about.description: Founded in Saint-Barthélemy, Chorale de Bons Chœurs is a community of passionate singers dedicated to celebrating the art of choral music. With a diverse repertoire spanning classical masterpieces to contemporary arrangements, we strive to bring joy and inspiration through every performance.

concerts.title: Upcoming Concerts
concerts.noUpcoming: No upcoming concerts scheduled at the moment. Check back soon!

venue.title: Our Performance Venue
venue.description: Most of our concerts take place at the beautiful Église de Saint-Barthélemy, a historic venue with exceptional acoustics that perfectly complements our choral performances.

ticketing.title: Select Your Tickets
ticketing.selectTickets: Please select at least one ticket
